card_description: The prince of this world is a historical figure referenced in Philip K. Dick's Exegesis. Appears in 2 Exegesis passages. Context: "Dick interprets several dreams and "ciphers" (Felix, Glossa) as a single, overwhelming message from Zebra: "God loves us."
